codeReview.summary: Implementation fully matches the feature requirements: config, agent, CLI, and tests were updated to llm_* names; env var names are now derived as VERONICA_LLM_URL/VERONICA_LLM_MODEL/VERONICA_LLM_API_KEY; and no lm_studio references remain in Python source.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The assigned skill (notify-worker) is misaligned for this feature type. The feature is a Python/CLI config-field rename, but the skill procedure is tailored to Go notify handler and /proc event-enrichment work.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json sets skillName="notify-worker" for this feature; .factory/skills/notify-worker/SKILL.md scopes work to internal/af/skills.go and internal/ebpf/manager.go; transcript skeleton shows only Python rename edits (src/veronica/config.py, src/veronica/agent.py, src/veronica/cli/main.py, tests).

summary: Pass. No blocking or non-blocking code issues found in commit 758e5c139d227cf2ee0077269051d23b0398b87f for rename-llm-config-fields. One shared-state observation was recorded about skill/procedure mismatch.
